task.title: Execute a Migration Plan
task.shortdesc: Run plan execution in dry-run mode, then apply mode, and verify the resulting execution report.

prereq.p: Have a validated plan.json and confirm the source root points to the package that generated the plan.
For first-time onboarding, keep this task in dry-run mode until plan targets and summary counts match expectations.

step.cmd: Run dry-run execution and write a report.

info.codeblock: python3 -m dita_package_processor execute \ --plan build/plan.json \ --source-root /path/to/package \ --output build/target \ --report build/execution-report-dry.json

step.cmd: Validate dry-run behavior from report output.
Execute apply mode and write a second report.

info.codeblock: python3 -m dita_package_processor execute \ --plan build/plan.json \ --source-root /path/to/package \ --output build/target \ --apply \ --report build/execution-report-apply.json

step.cmd: Inspect success, failure, and timing fields.

info.codeblock: jq '{started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, summary}' build/execution-report-apply.json jq '.results[] | select(.status=="failed") | {action_id, handler, error_type, message}' build/execution-report-apply.json

result.p: You complete plan execution with an auditable result record and a clear failure triage path when needed.
result.codeblock: execution-report-dry.json: dry_run=true execution-report-apply.json: dry_run=false duration_ms: integer >= 0
